description_long: This is a large, elegant Chesterfield-style sofa upholstered in white leather or faux leather, featuring deep button tufting across the backrest, arms, and front panel. The sofa has three distinct seat cushions that are uniform in size and appear to be firmly padded, providing ample seating space. Its armrests are rolled and generously padded, matching the height of the backrest and adorned with decorative tufting and nailhead trim along the front. The backrest is continuous and high, curving smoothly into the armrests for a classic, cohesive silhouette. The sofa sits on four short, rounded legs that are only slightly visible beneath the base. The overall design exudes a luxurious and timeless appeal, suitable for upscale urban environments such as hotel lobbies, stylish waiting areas, or chic apartment lounges.
description: A luxurious white Chesterfield sofa with deep button tufting, rolled armrests, and three uniform seat cushions. Its classic design and plush upholstery make it a standout piece for sophisticated urban interiors.
description_view_0: Front view showing the three seat cushions, deep button-tufted backrest, and rolled armrests with nailhead trim.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the rolled armrest, tufted side panel, and the sofa's substantial depth.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous, tufted backrest and the sofa's full width.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the rolled armrest and tufted detailing seen in view 1.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three uniform, attached seat cushions; continuous, deeply tufted backrest with no separate back cushions.
attribute_armrest_style: Present, rolled and padded armrests at the same height as the backrest, featuring deep button tufting and decorative nailhead trim.
attribute_leg_design: Four short, rounded legs positioned at the corners, minimally visible, likely made of dark wood or metal.
attribute_backrest_type: High, continuous backrest with a curved profile, deeply button-tufted, integrated with the armrests.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid white upholstery with a prominent deep button-tufted pattern across the backrest, arms, and front panel.
